parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: "query GetQuotes($cursor: String) { quotes(first: 100, after: $cursor) { nodes { id quoteNumber quoteStatus createdAt sentAt transitionedAt amounts { total } client { name } salesperson { id name { full } } } pageInfo { endCursor hasNextPage } } }", variables: { cursor: $json.cursor || null } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: "query GetRequests($cursor: String) { requests(first: 100, after: $cursor) { nodes { id createdAt client { name } } pageInfo { endCursor hasNextPage } } }", variables: { cursor: $json.cursor || null } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: "query GetClients($cursor: String, $filter: ClientFilterAttributes) { clients(first: 100, after: $cursor, filter: $filter) { nodes { id firstName lastName createdAt } pageInfo { endCursor hasNextPage } } }", variables: { cursor: $json.cursor || null, filter: { createdAt: { after: $now.format('yyyy') + "-01-01T00:00:00Z" } } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: "query GetInvoices($cursor: String) { invoices(first: 100, after: $cursor) { nodes { id invoiceNumber createdAt issuedDate dueDate invoiceStatus amounts { total invoiceBalance } } pageInfo { endCursor hasNextPage } } }", variables: { cursor: $json.cursor || null } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: "query GetJobs($cursor: String, $filter: JobFilterAttributes) { jobs(first: 50, after: $cursor, filter: $filter) { nodes { id jobNumber jobType jobStatus createdAt completedAt total jobCosting { totalRevenue } customFields { __typename ... on CustomFieldDropdown { label valueDropdown } } } pageInfo { endCursor hasNextPage } } }", variables: { cursor: $json.cursor || null, filter: { jobType: "ONE_OFF", createdAt: { after: "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z" } } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: "query GetRecurring($cursor: String, $filter: JobFilterAttributes) { jobs(first: 10, after: $cursor, filter: $filter) { nodes { id jobNumber jobType visits(first: 20) { nodes { id isComplete completedAt lineItems(first: 10) { nodes { totalPrice } } } } } pageInfo { endCursor hasNextPage } } }", variables: { cursor: $json.cursor || null, filter: { jobType: "RECURRING" } } }) }}
